notes: Developer tenant management deep CRUD is verified in real Chrome: create/search/edit tenant, open detail, fetch tenant roles, create tenant user, reset tenant user password, login with reset password, soft-delete, restore from recycle bin, re-delete, permanent delete, and clear recycle bin. Fixes include developer-scoped tenant users/roles/password APIs, getTenants keyword/search compatibility, React confirm callback wrapping, and permanent delete / clear recycle bin dependency cleanup for SQLite FK chains. Full Chrome smoke is 31/31. Inventory alert / 库存预警 remains explicitly out of scope and must not be restored. Claude CLI audit was invoked twice but timed out after 90s/60s and is recorded as Yellow external-tool evidence; Product Green remains Yellow for production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download beyond current slices.
